# Chalet du Tornet

> Lakeside restaurant, bar and terrace at the heart of the Domaine du Tornet, on the shore of Lake La Balme-de-Sillingy (Haute-Savoie, France) — about 20 minutes from Annecy. Generous traditional and Savoyard cuisine, a bar open all day, and a terrace facing the water. Open February to early November.

Key facts:
- Name: Chalet du Tornet (restaurant · bar · terrace)
- Address: 161 Route de Paris, 74330 La Balme-de-Sillingy, Haute-Savoie, France
- Coordinates: 45.970952, 6.032109
- Phone: +33 4 38 80 22 51
- Email: chaletdutornet74@gmail.com
- Cuisine: French, Savoyard, traditional · Price range: €€ · Reservations accepted (cash & card)
- Season: open February to early November
- Setting: inside the Domaine du Tornet, a free lakeside park — beach, pontoon, pumptrack, playground, fitness park, pétanque, gardens, picnic & camping-car areas, free parking, greenway (voie verte) bike access, wheelchair access (PMR)

## Language editions

The full site is available as a standalone page per language. French is the reference version; the others are complete translations of the same content.

- [Français (reference)](https://chaletdutornet.com/): site officiel — restaurant, carte, bar, Le Domaine, FAQ
- [English](https://chaletdutornet.com/en.html): official site — restaurant, menu, bar, the Estate, FAQ
- [Deutsch](https://chaletdutornet.com/de.html): offizielle Website — Restaurant, Speisekarte, Bar, das Gelände, FAQ
- [Italiano](https://chaletdutornet.com/it.html): sito ufficiale — ristorante, menù, bar, la tenuta, FAQ
- [Nederlands](https://chaletdutornet.com/nl.html): officiële website — restaurant, menu, bar, het domein, FAQ
- [Español](https://chaletdutornet.com/es.html): sitio oficial — restaurante, carta, bar, la finca, FAQ

## Opening hours

Hours cover the bar service and the kitchen separately.

- Monday–Wednesday: Bar 09:00–17:00 · Kitchen 11:45–13:45
- Thursday–Friday: Bar 09:00–23:00 · Kitchen 11:45–13:45 (lunch) and 19:00–21:30 (dinner)
- Saturday: Bar 09:30–23:00 · Kitchen 11:45–14:45 (lunch) and 19:00–21:30 (dinner)
- Sunday: Bar 09:30–17:30 · Kitchen 11:45–14:45

Hours apply during the open season (February to early November). Confirm by phone for holidays and private events.

## Menu highlights

- Traditional & Savoyard cuisine with local produce: raw-milk raclette, tartiflette, the "Burger du Tornet", MOF butcher's cut, trout
- Daily set menu (menu du jour) from €19.90
- Children's menu €13 (drink + main + fries/vegetables + dessert)
- À la carte examples: Burger du Tornet €22, duck terrine with foie gras €12
- Group menus and full-venue privatisation available for events
